steps.title: NOTE
steps.instruction: NOTE: To prevent contamination samples nucleic acid extraction and amplification (PCR) should be performed in separate rooms. Add 500 µL of ATL-DX buffer and 20 µL Proteinase K to the bead tubes prepared in Step 4 of "Before Start" section under the Guidelines & Warning tab.

steps.title: Place the sample swab in the...
steps.instruction: Place the sample swab in the bead tube with ATL buffer and Proteinase K. Use sterile scissors to carefully cut off the swab heads or transfer the pre-cut swab head from the original container to the bead tube with forceps.

steps.title: Include a positive control for each batch of samples
steps.instruction: Include a positive control for each batch of samples: transfer 37.5 µL ZymoBIOMICS Microbial Community Standard Material, 100 µL EBV, and 100 µL DENV-1 standard into a tube from Step 3 of "Before Start" section. Add 250 µL ATL-DX buffer and 20 µL proteinase K.

steps.title: Include a negative control for each batch of samples
steps.instruction: Include a negative control for each batch of samples: a bead tube from Step 3 of "Before Start" section with 500 µL ATL-DX buffer and 20 µL proteinase K.

steps.title: Incubate samples in a thermomixer at...
steps.instruction: Incubate samples in a thermomixer at 1400 rpm, 56 °C, 10 minutes .

steps.title: Refill the dry ice compartment of...
steps.instruction: Refill the dry ice compartment of the Bullet Blender if necessary. After incubation, load all samples into the Bullet Blender.

steps.title: Set the speed at 12 and the time at 3
steps.instruction: Set the speed at 12 and the time at 3. Press Start.

steps.title: Let the samples settle for 00:01:00...
steps.instruction: Let the samples settle for 00:01:00 in the Bullet Blender and then repeat Step 7.

steps.title: NOTE
steps.instruction: NOTE: KingFisher Flex only, if using KingFisher Duo Prime, go to section 3 Confirm 96 deep-well magnetic heads and 96 well deep-well heat blocks are being used.

steps.title: Ensure the program IndiMag_Pathogen_KF_Flex_4wash or the...
steps.instruction: Ensure the program IndiMag_Pathogen_KF_Flex_4wash or the program has been downloaded and loaded onto the KingFisher Flex instrument.

steps.title: Set up the Tip Comb, Wash,...
steps.instruction: Set up the Tip Comb, Wash, and Elution Plates outside the instrument according to the following table. NOTE: DO NOT use the elution buffer provided by the kit for TNA elution. The ingredients in the elution buffer inhibit the downstream DNA sequencing efficiency. %s %s Plate ID Plate position Plate type Reagent Volume per well Tip comb 7 Place a 96 Deep-well Tip comb in a deep-well plate Elution 6 Deep-Well Nuclease-free water 75 µL Wash 4 5 Deep-Well 100 % ethanol 750 µL Wash 3 4 Deep-Well 80% ethanol 750 µL Wash 2 3 Deep-Well Buffer AW2 700 µL Wash 1 2 Deep-Well Buffer AW1 700 µL Sample 1 Sample Lysate Lysate and lysis buffer 985 µL

steps.title: Transfer 290 µL supernatant without any...
steps.instruction: Transfer 290 µL supernatant without any particle carryover to the wells of the deep-well plate. This plate becomes the Sample Plate.

steps.title: Add 135 µL Buffer VXL, 540...
steps.instruction: Add 135 µL Buffer VXL, 540 µL Buffer ACB, and 20 µL MagAttract Suspension G to each sample in the sample plate. For multiple samples, make a master mix with 10% overage. Invert slowly to mix the master mix; avoid foaming (it can be mixed on a Hula mixer for 2 min). Add 695 µL mixture to each sample. Each well including sample lysate should be 985 µL .

steps.title: Select the program IndiMag_Pathogen_KF_Flex_4wash on the instrument
steps.instruction: Select the program IndiMag_Pathogen_KF_Flex_4wash on the instrument.

steps.title: Start the run, then load the...
steps.instruction: Start the run, then load the prepared plates into position when prompted by the instrument.

steps.title: After the running protocol is completed...
steps.instruction: After the running protocol is completed (~35 minutes), immediately remove the elution plate from the instrument and cover the plate or transfer the eluate to the final tube or plate of choice for final storage.

steps.title: In a 0
steps.instruction: In a 0.6 mL microcentrifuge tube, use 3 µL total nucleic acid for DNA and RNA concentration measurement using Qubit 4 Fluorometer following manufacturer instructions (Kits needed: Qubit 1X dsDNA HS Assay Kit and Qubit RNA HS Assay Kit) (see Appendix 2 and Appendix 3).

steps.title: Proceed with sample testing following the...
steps.instruction: Proceed with sample testing following the REDI-NET SOP SW-4 Swab Testing or store at -20 °C for less than 2 weeks (for long-term storage the sample needs to be stored at -80 °C following the REDI-NET SOP SW-3 Swab Storage).

steps.title: NOTE
steps.instruction: NOTE: KingFisher Duo Prime only, if using KingFisher Flex, go to 2. Confirm 12-tip magnetic heads and 12 well deep-well heat blocks are being used.

steps.title: Ensure the program IndiMag_Pathogen_KF_Duo_4wash has been...
steps.instruction: Ensure the program IndiMag_Pathogen_KF_Duo_4wash has been downloaded and loaded onto the KingFisher Duo Prime instrument.

steps.title: Set up the Sample Plate according to the table below
steps.instruction: Set up the Sample Plate according to the table below: %s %s Row ID Plate Row Reagent Volume per well Sample row A Lysate and lysis buffer 985 µL Wash 1 B Buffer AW1 700 µL Wash 2 C Buffer AW2 700 µL Wash 3 D 80 % ethanol 750 µL Wash 4 E 100 % ethanol 750 µL Tip Comb F Tip comb G Empty H

steps.title: Set up the Elution Strip according to the table below
steps.instruction: Set up the Elution Strip according to the table below: NOTE: DO NOT use the elution buffer provided by the kit for TNA elution. The ingredients in the elution buffer inhibit the downstream DNA sequencing efficiency. %s %s Strip ID Row Reagent Volume per well Elution A Nuclease-free water 75 µL

steps.title: Centrifuge the bead tubes with lysate...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge the bead tubes with lysate from Step 9 for 12000 x g, 4 °C, 5 minutes .

steps.title: Transfer 290 µL supernatant without any...
steps.instruction: Transfer 290 µL supernatant without any particle carryover to the wells of the Deep-well Row A. This row becomes the Sample Row.

steps.title: Add 135 µL Buffer VXL, 540...
steps.instruction: Add 135 µL Buffer VXL, 540 µL Buffer ACB, and 20 µL MagAttract Suspension G to each sample in the Sample Plate. For multiple samples, make a master mix with 10% overage. Invert slowly to mix the master mix and avoid foaming. Add 695 µL mixture to each sample. Each well including sample lysate should be 985 µL .

steps.title: Select the program IndiMag_Pathogen_KF_Duo_4wash on the instrument
steps.instruction: Select the program IndiMag_Pathogen_KF_Duo_4wash on the instrument.

steps.title: Start the run, then load the...
steps.instruction: Start the run, then load the prepared plate and Elution Strip into position when prompted by the instrument. Keep the door open while extraction is in process. The chamber of the KingFisher Duo Prime is small. Closing the door makes the ethanol vapor restrained inside the chamber and increases the ethanol contamination.

steps.title: After the running protocol is completed...
steps.instruction: After the running protocol is completed (~35 minutes), immediately remove the elution plate from the instrument and cover the plate or transfer the eluate to the final tube or plate of choice for final storage.

steps.title: In a 0
steps.instruction: In a 0.6 mL microcentrifuge tube, use 3 µL total nucleic acid for DNA and RNA concentration measurement using Qubit 4 Fluorometer following manufacturer instructions (Kits needed: Qubit 1X dsDNA HS Assay Kit and Qubit RNA HS Assay Kit) (see Appendix 2 and Appendix 3).

steps.title: Proceed with sample testing following the...
steps.instruction: Proceed with sample testing following the REDI-NET SOP SW-4 Swab Testing or store at -20 °C for less than 2 weeks (for long-term storage the sample needs to be stored at -80 °C following the REDI-NET SOP SW-3 Swab Storage).

steps.title: DNA quantification:
steps.instruction: DNA quantification:

steps.title: According to the volume of sample...
steps.instruction: According to the volume of sample used, add the 1x HS dsDNA Qubit Assay for a final volume of 200 µL (i.e., if using 3 µL of sample, add 197 µL of 1x HS dsDNA Qubit Assay). Vortex for 5 - 10 seconds, then incubate for 00:02:00 at Room temperature

steps.title: RNA Quantification:
steps.instruction: RNA Quantification:

steps.title: In a new microcentrifuge tube/falcon tube...
steps.instruction: In a new microcentrifuge tube/falcon tube (depending on the number of samples processed), prepare a working solution of the Qubit HS RNA Assay: %s %s Reagents Volume/sample Volume for n+1 sample Qubit RNA HS Assay buffer 199 µL …. µL Qubit RNA HS Assay Dye 1 µL …. µL

steps.title: In a new 0
steps.instruction: In a new 0.6 mL tube, mix 197 µL of Qubit HS RNA Assay working solution and 3 µL of the sample. Vortex for 5 - 10 seconds, then incubate for 00:02:00 at Room temperature before reading.

steps.title: Centrifuge the bead tubes with lysate...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge the bead tubes with lysate for 12000 x g, 4 °C, 5 minutes . STOPPING POINT : lysed samples can be stored at 4 °C Overnight .
